audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L425 checks `auctionStart == 0 || elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration` and reverts `InvalidAuction` on both conditions before any state changes occur. Since `s_auctionStarts[asset]` is set to `block.timestamp` on start (L353) and deleted (zeroed) on end (L367), the zero check covers both the never-started and already-ended cases, and the elapsed-time check covers the expired case. All code paths in `bid()` pass through this guard with no bypass.
